title: atriplex patula var. ruderalis
intro: Atriplex patula var. ruderalis, also known as red orache, is a variety of the saltbush plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its high content of vitamins A and C, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of red orache include its potential to support eye health, boost the immune system, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Red orache can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems.
